name: useWizard
examples: const { currentStepId, set, reset, back, next, history } = useWizard([ { id: 'step1', nodes: ['step2', 'step3'] }, { id: 'step2', nodes: ['step3'] }, { id: 'step3', nodes: [] }, ])
